sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: NNN stock holds steady. Focus turns to the REIT's portfolio.
feed.summary: NNN REIT Inc. operates a net-lease real estate investment trust focused on free-standing retail properties with long-term leases, providing stable income. The company's performance relies on recurring rental income, lease renewals, tenant quality, and acquisition discipline, rather than product cycles. Investors track its balance sheet, funding costs, and cash yield, with the core question being its ability to maintain stable cash flow amid changing economic conditions.

feed.title: Norton 360 Deluxe from Gen Digital Inc. - subscription security that follows US users across devices
feed.summary: The article details Norton 360 Deluxe, a subscription-based security suite from Gen Digital Inc. (NASDAQ: GEN) that offers multi-device protection, VPN, and dark web monitoring for US households. It highlights the product's features, pricing model, performance, and its competitive position in the consumer cybersecurity market. The suite is a key component of Gen Digital's strategy for recurring revenue and brand visibility, catering to the increasing need for comprehensive household device coverage.

feed.title: Will PNW's Capital Investment Plan Fuel Long-Term Earnings Growth?
feed.summary: Pinnacle West Capital (PNW) is investing $7.95 billion from 2026-2028 to strengthen its grid, meet rising electricity demand from industries like semiconductor manufacturing and data centers, and drive long-term earnings growth. These capital expenditures, aimed at transmission, distribution, and generation infrastructure, are expected to support a 7-9% rate base growth through 2028 and a 5-7% long-term EPS growth. Despite a projected decrease in 2026 EPS, PNW's systematic capital allocation and a favorable regulatory framework are set to fuel future growth, similar to investment plans by FirstEnergy Corp. and PPL Corporation.

feed.title: APS will turn a 1962 coal plant into natural gas, adding 380 MW
feed.summary: Arizona Public Service (APS) announced plans to convert two units at its Cholla Power Plant, originally commissioned in 1962, to natural gas with operations slated to begin in 2029. This conversion will add approximately 380 megawatts of energy to help meet Arizona's growing demand, power about 61,000 homes, and support the state's economic growth. The project leverages existing infrastructure, supports a diverse energy mix, and is expected to create jobs and tax revenue for local communities.

feed.title: Alliant Energy Corp stock hits all-time high at 77.4 USD
feed.summary: Alliant Energy Corp (LNT) stock has reached an all-time high of $77.40, marking a 28.65% total return over the past year. Despite being considered overvalued by InvestingPro data, the company has consistently maintained dividend payments for 56 years, boasting a current yield of 2.82%. Jefferies recently raised its price target for Alliant Energy to $85.00, citing an anticipated EPS growth acceleration of over 8% through 2030.

feed.title: FortiBleed Credential Theft Connected to INC and Lynx Ransomware
feed.summary: The FortiBleed credential theft campaign, initially focused on exposed Fortinet firewall logins, has now been linked to the INC Ransom and Lynx ransomware operations. Researchers identified an operator associated with FortiBleed infrastructure also managing negotiation panels for both ransomware groups, suggesting that stolen FortiGate firewall access was actively used for extortion. Investigators are also probing a previously undisclosed Nextcloud zero-day vulnerability being exploited by the actors.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group CEO Jason Liberty on Discovery Class, Perfect Day Mexico and Silversea River Cruises
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group CEO Jason Liberty discusses updates on various projects including the new Discovery Class ships, the status of Perfect Day Mexico, and the expansion of Celebrity River Cruises. He explains why Silversea's order books appear empty and addresses the possibility of further Royal Beach Clubs and Silversea River Cruises. Liberty emphasizes the company's focus on strategic growth and guest experience across its brands.

feed.title: Generac Holdings steadies its position as a power equipment leader. GNRC stock reflects long-term de
feed.summary: Generac Holdings continues to be a leader in backup power and energy technology, with its stock reflecting long-term demand for generators and energy management solutions. The company has expanded its portfolio beyond traditional generators to include cleaner energy systems, focusing on both residential and commercial sectors. Generac's business is driven by the increasing need for reliable electricity, distributed generation, and smart energy management, positioning it well for future growth in the energy transition.

feed.title: Rising healthcare costs have business owners worried about underinsured employees
feed.summary: A survey by Principal reveals that rising healthcare costs are a top concern for small and midsize business owners, impacting both their companies' bottom lines and employees' financial security. Despite offering comprehensive health insurance, many employees remain underinsured due to high deductibles and out-of-pocket costs. Business owners are responding by redesigning benefits packages, including voluntary and employer-sponsored group benefits, to close these coverage gaps and help employees achieve financial security.

feed.title: Have Insiders Sold PACS Group Shares Recently?
feed.summary: A recent analysis of PACS Group (NYSE: PACS) insider transactions revealed that the Chief Accounting Officer sold US$600k worth of shares, and the Chief Legal Officer sold US$4.8m in the last year, both at prices below the current market value. While significant insider ownership (70%) is a positive, the pattern of selling without corresponding buying raises caution among investors. The company is profitable and growing, but the insider selling trends indicate potential valuation concerns.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial balances wealth growth and insurance exposure
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial Inc. (ISIN US03076C1062) operates as a diversified financial services group, combining wealth management, asset management, and insurance solutions. This diversified approach aims to generate stable earnings through advisory fees, managed assets, and underwriting results, appealing to long-term investors. Their business model emphasizes wealth management at its core, supported by asset management offerings and integrated insurance products to address both asset growth and risk protection for clients.

feed.title: OPW SiteSentinel Nano from Dover Corp. - Tank monitoring as a subscription
feed.summary: The article introduces OPW SiteSentinel Nano from Dover Corp., a tank monitoring system that provides cloud-based reporting for fuel operators as a subscription service. It highlights how the Nano system helps US fuel retailers manage compliance risks, optimize inventory, and reduce environmental incidents by offering real-time data, automated alerts, and remote access. The author emphasizes that this product adds a recurring software and services revenue stream to Dover Corp.'s traditionally industrial portfolio.

feed.title: Eight lawsuits against Stryker stemming from cyberattack dismissed
feed.summary: Eight lawsuits against Stryker, filed after a cyberattack, were dismissed without prejudice by Judge Hala Y. Jarbou. The lawsuits alleged that the medical technology company failed to adequately protect sensitive personal information during the March cyber incident. Stryker had previously confirmed a "threat actor" infiltrated its systems and hid activity behind a malicious file.

feed.title: Fastenal Co. highlights its distribution strength as investors track the industrial cycle
feed.summary: Fastenal Co. operates a vast industrial supply distribution network in North America, leveraging on-site service and vending technology to serve a diverse customer base. The company's model emphasizes local inventory, rapid delivery, and vendor-managed inventory programs, making it resilient to industrial demand cycles. This approach allows investors to participate in industrial and manufacturing activity through an established distributor rather than just an equipment maker.

feed.title: Cisco Systems Inc Stock (CSCO) Moved Down by 3.72% on Jul 2: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Cisco Systems Inc. (CSCO) stock fell 3.72% on July 2nd, making it the worst performer on the Dow Jones Industrial Average due to a combination of valuation concerns, margin contraction from hardware shifts, and operational uncertainties. Investor sentiment was also negatively affected by ongoing restructuring costs, active cybersecurity exploits targeting its software, and consistent insider selling. Despite a "strong-buy" rating from some firms, these factors collectively drove the stock lower.

feed.title: Lam Research Corp Stock (LRCX) Moved Down by 7.40% on Jul 2: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Lam Research Corp (LRCX) stock dropped 7.40% due to macroeconomic uncertainty, fears of slowing AI infrastructure spending, and high stock valuations combined with insider selling. The company is particularly vulnerable to geopolitical risks given its significant revenue concentration in China. Technical indicators are mixed, while fundamental analysis notes solid revenue and net profit rankings within the Technology Equipment industry.

feed.title: Costco's Hidden Price Tag Codes Can Help You Get the Bigger Deals
feed.summary: Costco's price tags contain hidden codes that smart shoppers can use to identify deals and clearance items. Prices ending in $.99 indicate full price, while $.97 signals a clearance markdown, and $.09 denotes a temporary manufacturer's discount. Items ending in $.88 or $.00 are manager's specials, often indicating floor models or returned items, with $.00 prices being specific to that particular warehouse.

feed.title: Newell Brands (NWL) Set to Release Q2 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: Newell Brands (NWL) is scheduled to release its Q2 2026 financial results on July 31st, preceding a live webcast to discuss performance. The company projects 0-2% core sales growth and $0.16-$0.19 adjusted EPS for Q2, following better-than-expected Q1 results. Despite a moderate GF Score™ of 62 and recent insider selling of $1.3 million, GuruFocus assesses NWL as 6.8% undervalued with a GF Value™ of $6.28 against its current price of $5.85.

feed.title: Essex Property Trust focuses on West Coast apartments as investors weigh long-term rental demand
feed.summary: Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) specializes in multifamily properties on the West Coast, providing investors exposure to high-cost rental markets in California and Seattle. The company's strategy involves disciplined capital allocation, operational efficiency, and investment in upgrades to maintain competitiveness and high occupancy rates. Its focus on supply-constrained metropolitan areas driven by strong employment bases aims to support long-term rental demand and consistent cash flows.

feed.title: Orion Group Holdings highlights marine construction niche as investors weigh long-term growth prospe
feed.summary: Orion Group Holdings (ISIN US68628G1022) is a specialized construction contractor focusing on marine, industrial, and concrete projects across the U.S. coast and inland markets. The company offers investors exposure to infrastructure spending, port activity, and industrial capital projects, differentiating itself from broader real estate or commodity investments. Its specialized services, including civil marine construction and industrial concrete work, position it to benefit from ongoing public and private investments in U.S. infrastructure, despite potential risks from funding shifts and project execution challenges.

feed.title: Perion Network (PERI) director reports 2,160-share tax withholding sale
feed.summary: Perion Network director Michael Vorhaus sold 2,160 Ordinary Shares at $9.70 per share. This sale was not a discretionary open-market transaction but rather a tax withholding sale conducted by the company to cover obligations related to the vesting of restricted share units. Following the transaction, Vorhaus directly holds 24,613 Ordinary Shares, indicating he retains a significant stake.

feed.title: Expeditors International operations support global trade as logistics demand evolves
feed.summary: Expeditors International manages complex global freight flows using an asset-light logistics model, adapting to shifting trade routes and customer needs. The company's operations, including customs brokerage and supply chain consulting, are supported by technology for real-time visibility and risk management. This approach helps Expeditors navigate disruptions and maintain profitability while serving a diverse customer base.

feed.title: Aflac Inc shares and business overview
feed.summary: Aflac Inc. is a major U.S. supplemental insurance provider operating in the United States and Japan, focusing on voluntary benefits like supplemental health, cancer, accident, disability, and life coverage. The company is known for its stable, cash-generative business model, prudent underwriting, and capital strength, with its shares trading on a major U.S. stock exchange as part of the financials sector. Its strategic pillars include efficiency, digitalization, customer experience improvements, and disciplined capital deployment, aiming to maintain profitability and adapt to evolving markets.

feed.title: T-Mobile Joins America250 for Coast-to-Coast July 4 Celebrations
feed.summary: T-Mobile is partnering with America250 to celebrate the 250th anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence with events in New York City and Los Angeles. T-Mobile will provide its network and on-site experiences, including countdowns, block parties, and giveaways, while also supporting volunteer initiatives through America Gives. The company will continue its partnership throughout the year, including during MLB All-Star Week and the America Innovates Expo.

feed.title: Nocera to implement 1-for-30 reverse stock split By Investing.com
feed.summary: Nocera, Inc. (NASDAQ:NCRA) has announced a 1-for-30 reverse stock split to increase its per-share trading price and maintain its listing on The Nasdaq Capital Market. The move follows a significant decline in the stock's value over the past year. This decision is part of Nocera's broader strategy to transform into a diversified technology-focused holding company, with recent investments in AI and plans to establish a venture platform for technology companies.

feed.title: Why PROG (PRG) Shares Are Falling Today
feed.summary: Shares of PROG Holdings (PRG) fell 5.1% after Loop Capital downgraded the stock from 'Buy' to 'Hold', though it maintained its $48 price target. The downgrade suggests a more cautious outlook on the company's near-term performance. Despite this drop, the stock had previously gained 11.9% four months ago due to strong fourth-quarter profit estimates and a positive 2026 financial outlook.

feed.title: Why Boeing (BA) Stock Is Trading Up Today
feed.summary: Shares of Boeing (BA) rose 2.7% after a mixed bag of news including a positive sale-and-lease-back transaction for two 787-9 aircraft balanced by a new FAA safety directive for the 737 MAX concerning an electrical fault. The stock's modest gain contributed to a broader market rally, with shares trading at $224.48. The article also notes the distinction between commercial aerospace and defense segments, highlighting how falling oil prices positively impact airline profitability and thus commercial aircraft orders.

feed.title: Travelers launches proprietary LLM tailored to property casualty business
feed.summary: Travelers has developed TravelersLLM, a proprietary large language model specifically designed for its property and casualty insurance business. This LLM was trained on millions of internal company documents and built by Travelers' own engineers and data scientists. TravelersLLM aims to enhance underwriting analysis, accelerate research, and improve workflows by leveraging decades of institutional knowledge, and has reportedly outperformed commercially available AI models in tests.

feed.title: Medtronic starts to notify people affected by cyberattack
feed.summary: Medtronic has begun notifying individuals potentially affected by a cyberattack disclosed over two months ago, offering complimentary credit monitoring and identity theft services. The company states there is no evidence the accessed data has been publicly posted, and no impact on product security or patient safety has been identified. This incident follows a string of cyberattacks on other medtech companies, including Stryker, Intuitive Surgical, and iRhythm, highlighting an ongoing industry-wide vulnerability.

feed.title: Caterpillar Invests in the Future of Texas' Manufacturing Workforce
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. has launched a workforce commitment in Texas with an initial allocation of up to $5 million, as part of its five-year, $100 million Building the Future Workforce Initiative. This investment aims to prepare current and future workers in Texas for careers in advanced manufacturing and industry technician roles. Texas was chosen due to Caterpillar's significant presence there and the state's strong manufacturing infrastructure and educational institutions.

feed.title: National Fuel Gas Co highlights integrated energy model as investors eye long-term stability
feed.summary: National Fuel Gas Co (NFG) presents a diversified energy profile by combining regulated natural gas distribution with exploration and pipeline assets. This integrated model offers investors stable cash flows from regulated utilities and infrastructure, balanced with growth potential and volatility from commodity-linked exploration and production activities. The company's focus on long-term infrastructure investment and its ability to adapt capital allocation across segments make it appealing to those seeking stability and flexibility in the energy sector.

feed.title: Blackstone-Backed Jersey Mike’s Files for IPO as Listings Jump
feed.summary: Jersey Mike’s Subs Inc., a sandwich chain supported by Blackstone Inc., has filed for an initial public offering (IPO), contributing to a growing trend of increased listing activities in the US. The company operates over 3,300 locations across the US and Canada and recently partnered with its founder to expand into the UK and Ireland. This move signifies a rebound in the US IPO market.

feed.title: Atmos Energy focuses on regulated gas business as investors weigh defensive utilities exposure
feed.summary: Atmos Energy operates one of the largest fully regulated natural gas distribution and pipeline networks in the U.S., offering a stable earnings profile attractive to investors seeking defensive utility holdings. The company's strategy emphasizes infrastructure modernization, safety, and a focus on long-term regulatory frameworks that allow for cost recovery and a return on equity. Investors value Atmos Energy for its earnings stability, dividend history, and role as a portfolio ballast during economic uncertainty, alongside its engagement in the broader energy transition.

feed.title: Can AT&T's Build-A-Plan Expansion Strengthen Its Competitive Edge?
feed.summary: AT&T is expanding its Build-A-Plan offering to provide customers with greater flexibility and personalization across wireless and home Internet services, aiming to improve convenience and value. This enhanced plan allows customers to customize wireless services and easily bundle home Internet options like AT&T Fiber or Internet Air, with bundled packages starting at $70 per month. Despite these efforts, AT&T faces strong competition from Verizon and T-Mobile, and its shares have underperformed the industry over the past year.

feed.title: Nano-X Imaging Ltd. (NNOX) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP has announced a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Nano-X Imaging Ltd. (NNOX). The lawsuit alleges that Nano-X overstated efficiency gains and product demand, while their production was poorly aligned with demand, leading to increased operating expenses and cash burn. Investors who suffered losses between March 31, 2025, and April 17, 2026, have until August 11, 2026, to apply to be a lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Caterpillar Invests in the Future of Texas' Manufacturing Workforce
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. announced a new workforce commitment in Texas as part of its five-year, $100 million "Building the Future Workforce Initiative." The company will allocate up to $5 million to prepare current and future workers for advanced manufacturing and industry technician jobs in the state. This initiative aims to reduce barriers to training, define in-demand skills, and connect individuals to careers, collaborating with organizations like Texas State Technical College and the Manufacturing Institute.

feed.title: Zoetis Inc. (ZTS) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz announced that shareholders of Zoetis Inc. (ZTS) who suffered losses have an opportunity to lead a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that between January 14, 2025, and May 6, 2026, Zoetis failed to disclose material information regarding weakening prescription growth for Librela, market share loss for Simparica Trio and dermatology products due to new competitors, making their positive statements materially misleading. Investors are encouraged to contact the firm by the lead plaintiff deadline of July 27, 2026.

feed.title: Caterpillar puts up to $5M into Texas manufacturing jobs training
feed.summary: Caterpillar is investing up to $5 million in Texas as part of its $100 million "Building the Future Workforce Initiative" to prepare workers for advanced manufacturing and industry technician roles. The decision to focus on Texas is due to Caterpillar's significant presence there, including 6,630 employees and 17 facilities, along with the state's strong educational infrastructure. The initiative aims to reduce training barriers, define future-ready skills, and connect individuals to careers in collaboration with partners like Texas State Technical College and the Manufacturing Institute.

feed.title: IP, Ineos Styrolution, Smurfit Westrock to shutter plants
feed.summary: Multiple manufacturers in the packaging industry, including Ineos Styrolution, International Paper, and Smurfit Westrock, announced plant closures in June 2026, impacting over 480 workers. Ineos Styrolution is closing its polystyrene production site in Channahon, Illinois, affecting about 100 employees, citing margin pressures. International Paper will close four facilities in Illinois, California, New Jersey, and Kentucky, affecting a total of 330 workers, while Smurfit Westrock is closing a folding carton facility in Lebanon, Tennessee, impacting 52 employees.

feed.title: Organon & Co highlights its women’s health focus as a standalone company
feed.summary: Organon & Co positions itself as a global women's health specialist after spinning off from a larger pharmaceutical group. The company strategically focuses on contraception, fertility, and established medicines to generate steady cash flows for reinvestment and innovation. Its diversified portfolio aims to balance specialized offerings with broadly used therapies, ensuring revenue stability and addressing unmet medical needs in women's health.

feed.title: DOW Maintained by Alembic Global -- Price Target Lowered to $45.
feed.summary: Alembic Global has maintained an "Overweight" rating for Dow Inc (DOW) but lowered its price target from $50.00 to $45.00, reflecting a cautious outlook despite the stock appearing 30.7% undervalued according to GF Value™. DOW's GF Score™ is 56/100, indicating moderate potential for long-term returns, with profitability being a strength and momentum a weakness. Investors are advised to proceed with caution due to the mixed signals and absence of recent insider trading activity.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical Gains as Investors Appear to Position for Mid-July Earnings
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) saw a 4.0% stock gain today, potentially due to investors anticipating its Q2 earnings call on July 16, 2026. This optimism likely stems from strong Q1 2026 performance, including a 23% revenue increase and significant da Vinci 5 system placements, along with recent product enhancements. The article also details insider trading, hedge fund activity, government contracts, congressional trading, and analyst ratings for ISRG.

feed.title: General Mills Beats, But 'Less Bad' Outlook Leaves Analyst Unimpressed
feed.summary: General Mills (NYSE: GIS) beat its fourth-quarter earnings estimates but provided a "less bad" fiscal 2027 outlook, leaving TD Cowen analyst Robert Moskow unimpressed due to concerns over weak organic sales growth visibility. Moskow reiterated a Hold rating, raising the price target slightly to $32, while highlighting the company's strategic pivot to value growth and planned cost savings. Despite the announced initiatives, the analyst expressed a broader concern about the structural decline in "Big Food."

feed.title: CMS Energy stock holds the focus as investors await the next filing cycle
feed.summary: CMS Energy (ISIN US12589P1012), a U.S. utility company, maintains its focus on regulated electric and natural gas operations in Michigan. The stock trades on the NYSE, with its market case based on earnings visibility, rate-base growth, and utility-style cash generation. The company's core business model revolves around Consumers Energy, its regulated utility franchise, providing steady earnings rather than fast quarterly swings.

feed.title: Director at Public Storage (NYSE: PSA) awarded 126 LTIP units as pay
feed.summary: Public Storage director Luke J. Petherbridge received 126 LTIP Units as equity compensation, fully vested and granted at $0.00 per unit under the company’s Non-Management Trustee Compensation and Deferral Program. These units, which qualify as profits interests, can convert into OP Units and then be exchanged for common shares or their cash equivalent. Following this grant, Petherbridge now holds a total of 462 LTIP Units.

feed.title: FactSet Research Systems: Rising AI Adoption Bodes Well for Subscription Value Growth, Says Analyst
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets analyst Ashish Sabadra reiterated a Sector Perform rating for FactSet Research Systems (NYSE: FDS) with a price target of $240, after the company reported strong third-quarter organic annual subscription value (ASV) growth, exceeding consensus expectations. The analyst highlighted significant AI monetization, with AI products contributing to ASV growth and increasing adoption among top clients. Sabadra also noted a positive outlook for the company's fourth-quarter performance and anticipates a meaningful margin recovery.

feed.title: AngloGold Ashanti vs. Newmont: Which Gold Mining Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
feed.summary: This article compares AngloGold Ashanti and Newmont, two major gold mining stocks, to determine which is a better investment in 2026. It analyzes their financial performance in fiscal year 2025, risk profiles, and valuations, concluding that AngloGold Ashanti is the better buy due to its higher growth potential and significantly better dividend yield, despite Newmont's larger scale and stability.

feed.title: Live Nation Entertainment focuses on live events as investors track concert demand
feed.summary: Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) remains a key player in the global live events industry, with investors closely monitoring its concert and ticketing activities as indicators of broader entertainment spending. The company's core business involves organizing and promoting concerts and festivals, managing venues, and operating digital ticketing platforms. Its revenue streams are diversified through concert promotion, ticketing sales, and sponsorship deals, making its performance sensitive to consumer spending habits and broader economic conditions.

feed.title: Top 5 Real Estate and Realty Stocks to Invest In According to Hedge Funds
feed.summary: This article identifies the top 5 real estate and realty stocks favored by hedge funds, providing a glimpse into their investment strategies. It highlights Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE:MAA) as a key player, detailing its operational performance, development focus, and use of AI in its management platform. The piece offers a preview of a more extensive list and discusses notable performance metrics and strategic initiatives for the featured stock.

feed.title: Pentair plc focuses on water solutions as a diversified industrial player
feed.summary: Pentair plc is a diversified industrial company that specializes in water and fluid management technologies for residential, commercial, and industrial applications. The company's strategy involves focusing on water and fluid management, investing in innovation, and targeting high-margin, technology-driven solutions, all supported by long-term demands for water infrastructure, sustainability, and recurring aftermarket needs. Pentair's shares are listed on a major stock exchange, attracting investors interested in industrial and water infrastructure themes, with performance reflecting financial fundamentals and broader market conditions.
